message.content:
@startuml
participant "sidetree-core-go" as Actor1
participant "Instance 1" as Inst1
participant "Instance 2" as Inst2
participant "sidetree-core-go" as Actor2

participant "Operation Queue" as OpQueue1
participant "orb.operation" as OpQueue2
participant "op-queue DB" as OpQueue3

OpQueue1..> OpQueue2
OpQueue2..> OpQueue3

Actor1 ..> Inst1 : Subscribe
Inst1 ..> OpQueue2 : ok

Inst1 ..> OpQueue1 : Add(op1)
OpQueue1 ..> OpQueue2 : Publish(op1)
OpQueue2 ..> Inst1 : ok
Inst1 ..> Actor1 : ok

Actor2 ..> Inst2 : Add(op2)
Inst2 ..> OpQueue2 : Publish(op2)
OpQueue2 ..> Inst2 : ok
Inst2 ..> Actor2 : ok

Inst1 ..> OpQueue2 : op2
OpQueue2 ..> Inst1 : ok
OpQueue2 ..> OpQueue3 : Put(op2,handler1ID,expiry)
OpQueue3 ..> Inst1 : ok
Inst1 ..> OpQueue2 : Ack(op2)
OpQueue2 ..> Inst1 : ok
Inst1 ..> Actor1 : ok

Inst2 ..> OpQueue2 : op1
OpQueue2 ..> Inst2 : ok
OpQueue2 ..> OpQueue3 : Put(op1,handler2ID,expiry)
OpQueue3 ..> Inst2 : ok
OpQueue2 ..> Inst2 : Ack(op1)
OpQueue2 ..> Inst2 : ok
Inst2 ..> Actor2 : ok

@enduml
